team_name: ProcureOS: Autonomous AI Procurement Intelligence Platform
summary: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement by CRPF
key_steps: Extract eligibility criteria from tender documents
Convert legal clauses into machine-readable rules
Detect risks and possible bidder collusion using graph analytics
Generate explainable procurement recommendations and reports
optimization_claims: Reduce evaluation time from days to minutes
constraints_addressed: Slow, manual, and prone to errors
